mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_relation (user_id, friend_id, group_name, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{groupName}, #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_relation SET interaction_count = interaction_count + 1, last_interaction_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
SELECT fr.* FROM friend_relation fr WHERE fr.user_id = #{userId} AND fr.friend_id = #{friendId}
